title: Data Table
description: A sortable, selectable table for displaying tabular data with headers, checkboxes, and action columns.
whenToUse: For displaying structured tabular data. When users need to sort, filter, or select rows. For data review and bulk actions.
whenNotToUse: For simple key/value pairs — use a definition list. For highly complex data — consider a specialized grid component outside UDS.
_legacyAccessibilityNotes: Use semantic <table>, <thead>, <tbody>. Sortable headers announce current sort direction via aria-sort.
